events.title: Costco reaches best available historical close
events.summary: Costco reached its best available historical closing price of USD 1094.32.
events.stockLayerLesson: A best-ever price can signal strong momentum, but future returns still depend on valuation, earnings delivery and expectations.

events.title: Costco added to StockLayer coverage
events.summary: Costco is now included in StockLayer's market data, risk and company tracking layer.
events.stockLayerLesson: Defensive consumer companies are judged by resilience, pricing power and their ability to sustain demand through different economic cycles.
